brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 40s with valid worst-case reasoning (30s wait + 10s processing); goes one level beyond surface by reconciling the two engineer descriptions and explaining best-case vs worst-case framing, but does not trace third-order effects; presents answer linearly with no explicit reflection on assumptions or potential reasoning traps; states the calculation without sanity-checking from an alternative derivation angle or boundary condition test; acknowledges Engineer M may be measuring aspirationally or partially, distinguishing optimistic vs mechanistic descriptions, but without structured confidence levels; offers three candidate explanations for M's claim (rounding, aspirational, partial measurement) but does not evaluate why each alternative is more or less plausible, nor consider alternative interpretations of the latency ceiling; every step of the derivation is shown explicitly—worst-case arrival timing, window wait, processing time—sufficient for full reproduction by a third party.
